Grammarly Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

AI-powered grammar, tone, and clarity checker with a generative writing assistant.

MakerGrammarly Inc.
CategoryAI Writing Tools
PricingFree plan available; Premium from $12/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Grammarly →

Best for

Everyday proofreading and tone-checking across any app.

Pros

  • Works everywhere via browser extension and desktop app
  • Strong free tier for grammar and spelling
  • Tone and clarity suggestions beyond basic grammar

Cons

  • Advanced generative rewriting needs Premium
  • Can be overly conservative with stylistic writing

Alternatives to Grammarly

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

Jasper

An AI writing platform built for marketing teams and brand-consistent content.

Copy.ai

AI copywriting tool focused on marketing content and workflow automation.
